description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode was traveling west on 16th Street past Noe Street in San Francisco when it 
encountered a Pickup truck reversing into its lane from a perpendicular parking spot ahead. The Zoox vehicle slowed to a stop, and while it 
waited for the lane to clear, a passenger car (Vehicle 2) began to reverse.  The Zoox vehicle honked at Vehicle 2, but Vehicle 2 continued to 
reverse and made contact at low speed with the passenger-side front door of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle operator then disengaged 
from autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. No injuries were reported, and the police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
